subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-09-18 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Write to him to go and teach the Cause, spread the coming of the Kingdom and herald the dawn of the Sun of Reality... in this movement there are no regular salaried teachers.
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
